02 — Career History

Professional Experience

Feb 2024 – May 2026

Data Engineer

Hexagon AP — Illinois, USA

Streaming + batch data platform on AWS · Snowflake · Airflow · Kafka · PySpark

  • Architected a Data Lake Publisher on PySpark, Spark Streaming & Kafka (EMR + S3) ingesting change events for 300+ source tables with <1 minute latency, replacing a nightly batch process so finance and ops could run same-day reports.
  • Tuned the team's heaviest Snowflake and PL/SQL workloads via partition pruning, clustering keys & materialized aggregates — query runtime dropped from 14 min → under 4 min, saving ~$18K/month in compute spend.
  • Designed streaming data model for a real-time financial application: DynamoDB change streams → Kinesis → Spark Streaming → Glue → Lambda, sustaining >10K events/sec with no data loss across 9 months in production.
  • Owned 40+ Airflow DAGs with retry logic and SLA alerting — reduced pipeline on-call pages by 70% quarter-over-quarter.
  • Built 10+ QuickSight & Power BI dashboards for leadership forecasting and KPI review, eliminating ~12 hours/week of manual Excel work across three teams.
  • Primary on-call for the data platform — authored runbooks and CloudWatch alarms cutting failure detection from hours → under 10 minutes.

Dec 2019 – Dec 2021

Data Integration Engineer

Artificial Penetration Software Solutions — Hyderabad, India

EDW on Informatica · DataStage · SSIS · SQL Server · KornShell

  • Rebuilt critical Informatica + DataStage ingestion path feeding the EDW — cut nightly load times from 6.5 hrs → 2.4 hrs, restoring the BI team's morning analytics window.
  • Tuned 30+ stored procedures and SSIS packages via indexing, set-based rewrites & KornShell parallelism — execution time dropped ~40% and two recurring SLA breaches were eliminated.
  • Built data-profiling and reconciliation scripts surfacing 1,200+ source-system data quality defects in Q1, directly improving downstream report accuracy.
  • Designed dimensional models (star schema, SCD Type 2) for sales, billing & customer subject areas supporting both batch and near-real-time ETL/ELT loads.
  • Hit 9 of 10 sprint commitments on time, working directly with business analysts and product owners to turn fuzzy requirements into real datasets.
